title: coryphopteris krayanensis
intro: Coryphopteris krayanensis, also known as Krayan fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coryphopteris krayanensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
